senses.definition: a type of motor that burns fuel inside cylinders to generate power for vehicles or machinery

examples.x: Cars and motorcycles commonly use internal combustion engines to move, burning fuel like gasoline or diesel to create energy.
The internal combustion engine revolutionized transportation by providing a more efficient way to power vehicles compared to older steam engines.
Mechanics often need to check the oil and coolant levels regularly to keep internal combustion engines running smoothly.
Many modern generators also rely on internal combustion engines to produce electricity during power outages.
Engineers continue to improve internal combustion engine designs to make them more fuel-efficient and environmentally friendly.

senses.definition: a shaft that converts the up and down motion of the pistons into rotational motion

examples.x: The crankshaft was damaged and needed replacement.
She checked the crankshaft for any signs of wear.
He installed a high-performance crankshaft in his race car.
They inspected the crankshaft bearings during the engine rebuild.
The crankshaft turned smoothly, indicating no issues.

senses.definition: a system of gears that transmits power from the engine to the wheels

examples.x: The gearbox was making a grinding noise.
She shifted through the gears in the gearbox smoothly.
He replaced the gearbox with a more robust model.
They serviced the gearbox to fix the leaking oil.
The gearbox allowed for seamless gear changes.

senses.definition: the part of an engine where fuel is burned to produce energy

examples.x: In a car engine, the combustion chamber mixes fuel and air before burning it to create power.
The combustion chamber in a furnace is where oil or gas is ignited to generate heat for a home.
Aircraft engines have specially designed combustion chambers to efficiently burn fuel at high altitudes.
The combustion chamber in a rocket engine is crucial for propelling the spacecraft into space by burning fuel.
Engineers study combustion chambers to improve efficiency and reduce emissions in various types of engines.

senses.definition: a part that directs exhaust gases from the engine

examples.x: The manifold in a car helps to gather and expel exhaust gases produced by the engine.
Mechanics often check the manifold for leaks or cracks during routine maintenance.
The manifold plays a crucial role in maintaining the cleanliness of the engine and reducing pollution from vehicle exhaust.

senses.definition: a device that cools the engine by transferring heat from the coolant to the air

examples.x: The radiator was leaking and needed to be repaired.
She added coolant to the radiator before the long drive.
He installed a larger radiator to prevent overheating.
They flushed the radiator to remove any blockages.
The radiator fan turned on to help cool the engine.

senses.definition: a device that ignites the fuel-air mixture in the engine cylinders

examples.x: She checked the spark plug gap before installation.
They inspected the spark plugs as part of the tune-up.
The spark plug wires were replaced to ensure a strong spark.
He upgraded to high-performance spark plugs for better ignition.
The spark plug needed to be replaced due to fouling.

senses.definition: a device that controls the amount of fuel-air mixture entering the engine

examples.x: The throttle was stuck, causing the engine to rev high.
She gently pressed the throttle to accelerate smoothly.
He installed a new throttle body for improved response.
They adjusted the throttle cable for better control.
The electronic throttle provided precise control over engine power.

senses.definition: a device that routes high-voltage electricity to the spark plugs in the correct firing order

examples.x: She adjusted the distributor timing for better performance.
He replaced the distributor rotor during the tune-up.
They upgraded to an electronic distributor for reliability.
The distributor sent the spark to each cylinder at the right time.

senses.definition: an object that turns chemical energy to electricity to give power to a device or machine

examples.x: The flashlight wouldn't turn on because the battery was dead.
She replaced the old battery in her watch with a new one.
The electric car's battery allows it to travel long distances without emissions.
He always carries spare batteries for his camera during outdoor adventures.

senses.definition: a device that mixes air and fuel for internal combustion engines

examples.x: The carburetor needed cleaning due to buildup.
She adjusted the carburetor to improve fuel efficiency.
He rebuilt the carburetor to restore proper function.
They replaced the old carburetor with a more efficient model.
The carburetor provided a precise fuel-air mixture for the engine.

senses.definition: a device in a carburetor that restricts airflow to enrich the fuel-air mixture for starting a cold engine

examples.x: The choke was engaged to help start the cold engine.
She released the choke once the engine warmed up.
He adjusted the choke for better cold starts.
The choke helped the engine start smoothly in cold weather.

senses.definition: a belt that drives the engine cooling fan and other accessories like the alternator and power steering pump

examples.x: The fan belt was worn and needed replacement.
She checked the tension of the fan belt regularly.
He replaced the fan belt with a high-quality one.
They noticed a squealing noise from the loose fan belt.
The fan belt snapped, causing the engine to overheat.

senses.definition: a device that reduces noise from the exhaust system

examples.x: The muffler had a hole and was making a loud noise.
She replaced the muffler to quiet the exhaust.
He installed a performance muffler for a deeper sound.
They inspected the muffler for rust and damage.
The muffler helped reduce the engine's noise level significantly.

senses.definition: a tool for measuring the level of oil in an engine

examples.x: She checked the oil level using the dipstick.
The dipstick indicated that the oil level was low.
The dipstick had clear markings for easy reading.

senses.definition: a filter that removes contaminants from engine oil

examples.x: The oil filter needed to be changed at the next service.
He replaced the oil filter during the routine oil change.
They inspected the oil filter for signs of clogging.
The oil filter helped keep the engine oil clean.
She installed a high-performance oil filter for better engine protection.

senses.definition: the lubricating oil used in internal combustion engines

examples.x: She topped up the motor oil before the long trip.
He chose a synthetic motor oil for better engine performance.
They changed the motor oil every 5,000 miles.
The motor oil was dirty and needed replacement.
The motor oil lubricated the engine's moving parts.

senses.definition: a liquid added to the engine coolant to prevent freezing and overheating

examples.x: They flushed the cooling system and added fresh antifreeze.
The antifreeze helped prevent the engine from overheating.
The antifreeze protected the engine from freezing in cold weather.
